title: ArmorUp
description: A Minecraft plugin that introduces new custom armor, bows, and swords.
body:
### **What is ArmorUp?**
ArmorUp is a simple Minecraft Paper plugin that introduces new armor pieces, bows and swords that can be crafted and used by players.

### **How do I install this plugin?**
The JAR file must be downloaded and inserted into the “plugins” folder of the server.

### **How do I manage the permissions?**
To manage the permissions, you must ensure that you are a server operator. As an operator, you have the option of manually managing the permissions for armor, bows and swords. Further information can be obtained using the “/au” command.

### **Permission Nodes**
- armorup.permission.admin - Administrator permissions (default: op)
- armorup.permission.command - Permission for accessing the help list (default: true)
- armorup.permission.armor - Permission for crafting new armor (default: op)
- armorup.permission.bow - Permission for crafting new bows (default: op)
- armorup.permission.sword - Permission for crafting new swords (default: op)

### **Source Code**
https://github.com/Detonario/ArmorUp
